entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange that began under the Huobi brand in September 2013 and later rebranded to HTX.
entity.notes: Official history identifies September 2013 as the start of spot trading. The Huobi-to-HTX rebrand is treated as continuity of the same exchange entity.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the HTX brand.

changes.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange that began under the Huobi brand in September 2013 and later rebranded to HTX.
changes.notes: Official history identifies September 2013 as the start of spot trading. The Huobi-to-HTX rebrand is treated as continuity of the same exchange entity.

events.title: Huobi exchange entered operation
events.description: The exchange now known as HTX entered operation under the Huobi brand in September 2013.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker; the later HTX rebrand remains part of the same continuing entity.

evidence.title: About HTX
evidence.notes: Official company history stating that the exchange was founded in 2013 and debuted spot trading in September.

evidence.title: Huobi archived official domain
evidence.notes: Archive index retained to corroborate the historical Huobi identity preceding HTX.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for HTX
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the HTX identity, Huobi history, Seychelles registration, and 2013 establishment year.
